regional_cost_note: Drainage specialists in Rotorua typically charge $85–$160/m for French drains, $1,600–$4,200 for soakpits, and $5,500–$28,000+ for full site drainage. Rotorua rates are generally competitive — expect to pay near or slightly below the national average. Poor site drainage is one of the most common causes of foundation problems — a drainage assessment is worthwhile before any significant earthworks.
